NAMIBIA LUXURY SAFARIS

ENQUIRE NOW

A Journey Through the Seasons

When to visit Namibia

January

Green Season
Avg Temp 18—30°C
Rainfall 100mm

Hot with dramatic afternoon thunderstorms. Landscapes turn vividly green causing spectacular contrast.

Explore Guide

February

Green Season
Avg Temp 18—30°C
Rainfall 110mm

Peak green season. Excellent for birdwatching and photography against moody, stormy skies.

Explore Guide

March

Shoulder Season
Avg Temp 16—29°C
Rainfall 80mm

Warm days with diminishing rains. Skies begin to clear beautifully, leaving dust-free air.

Explore Guide

April

Shoulder Season
Avg Temp 14—27°C
Rainfall 40mm

Comfortable temperatures, mostly dry, and exceptional light makes this a highly favored travel month.

Explore Guide

May

Dry Season
Avg Temp 9—25°C
Rainfall 10mm

Sunny, mild days and cooler nights. Fantastic overall travel conditions for exploring the country.

Explore Guide

June

Dry Season
Avg Temp 6—22°C
Rainfall 3mm

The chill of winter arrives. Vegetation thins, drawing wildlife to the remaining waterholes.

Explore Guide

July

Peak Season
Avg Temp 6—21°C
Rainfall 1mm

Very cold mornings but exceptional, highly concentrated game viewing in the national parks.

Explore Guide

August

Peak Season
Avg Temp 8—24°C
Rainfall 1mm

Bone-dry landscapes and warming days. Prime time for Etosha safaris and clear stargazing.

Explore Guide

September

Peak Season
Avg Temp 12—28°C
Rainfall 2mm

Warm, dry, and dusty. Predictable water sources guarantee superb, uninterrupted wildlife sightings.

Explore Guide

October

Shoulder Season
Avg Temp 15—30°C
Rainfall 10mm

Intense heat builds alongside highly concentrated wildlife action before the rains break.

Explore Guide

November

Shoulder Season
Avg Temp 17—31°C
Rainfall 40mm

The dramatic build-up to the rains. Warm, humid, dynamic skies, and brilliant for photography.

Explore Guide

December

Green Season
Avg Temp 18—32°C
Rainfall 60mm

Hot summer days accompanied by the very first green shoots of the new rainy season.

Explore Guide

Start Your Journey

Namibia Self-Drive
Safari Experience

Self-drive safaris in Namibia allow travellers to experience Etosha National Park, Sossusvlei, and the Skeleton Coast independently. Enjoy flexible itineraries, scenic drives, and handpicked accommodations tailored to your travel style.

Start Your Journey

EXPLORE NAMIBIA'S TOP LUXURY SELF-DRIVE ITINERARIES

14-Day Luxury Namibia Drive & Fly Photo Safari

Experience Namibia’s highlights in comfort. Drive through deserts, wildlife parks, and coastlines on a 14-day self-drive safari.

‎14-Day Luxury Namibia Highlights Self-Drive Safari

Discover Namibia, Chobe, and Victoria Falls in one epic 17-day self-drive safari filled with wildlife, culture, and natural wonders. 

12-Day Namibia Self-Drive Luxury Safari Circuit     

Uncover Namibia’s hidden gems on an 18-day self-drive safari, exploring remote landscapes, wildlife havens, and cultural treasures. 

10-Day Namibia Honeymoon Luxury Fly-In Safari

Journey from Namibia’s deserts to Victoria Falls on an 18 -day self-drive safari, filled with wildlife, culture, and unforgettable landscapes.

‎10-Day Ultra-Luxury Namibia Safari - North Focus

Track Namibia’s wildlife on an 11-day self-drive safari, exploring Etosha’s game-rich plains, desert landscapes, and unique cultural encounters.

‎ 10-Day Ultra-Luxury Namibia Safari - South Focus

Journey through Namibia’s south on an 11-day self-drive safari, visiting deserts, canyons, ghost towns, and wide-open landscapes.”

WHAT OUR TRAVELLERS SAY

Every journey leaves a story behind. Discover the raw, unfiltered voices of our guests as they share their Desert Tracks adventures across Namibia and Botswana. Their words capture the magic better than we ever could.

Everything you need to know

Frequently Asked Questions

What is a self-drive safari?

A self-drive safari gives you the freedom to explore Africa's wild spaces at your own pace. You travel in your own rental vehicle, stop for photos whenever you like, and enjoy the adventure of the open road with nature as your guide.

Do I need a 4x4 vehicle?

For most routes, a 4x4 is recommended to handle gravel roads and sandy tracks comfortably. It also gives you access to more remote parks and viewpoints, making your safari experience far richer and more rewarding.

What vehicles do you provide?

We work exclusively with Namibia's most trusted car rental suppliers, providing well-equipped 4x4 vehicles designed for the country's toughest road conditions. Each vehicle offers ample storage space for luggage and camera gear, full insurance cover, and 24/7 roadside assistance for complete peace of mind.

Private airport transfers and seamless handovers ensure your journey starts effortlessly, while our handpicked vehicles give you the freedom to explore Namibia safely, comfortably, and in style.

What is included and excluded in the package?

Seamlessly Included

  • Accommodation in your chosen category (standard, comfort, or luxury)
  • Daily meals as specified in the itinerary
  • Reliable 4×4 rental vehicle with insurance and roadside assistance
  • Airport transfers on arrival and departure
  • Selected activities listed in the itinerary
  • Comprehensive digital travel diary with itinerary, maps & booking vouchers
  • 24/7 local support and assistance during your journey

Additionally Excluded

  • International flights to and from Namibia
  • Personal travel insurance (mandatory)
  • Visa costs and applications
  • Gratuities and personal expenses
  • Optional activities not specified in the itinerary
  • Fuel for the rental vehicle
  • National park entry fees and conservation levies
  • Additional camping equipment or accessories
